title: centaurea antennata var. meridionalis
intro: Centaurea antennata var. meridionalis, also known as the Centaury, is a plant species that belongs to the aster family, native to Europe and Asia, and is characterized by its small, yellow flowers and slender stem. The medicinal properties of Centaury include its ability to act as a bitter and astringent, which makes it effective in treating digestive issues and promoting saliva production. The health benefits of Centaury include its potential to soothe digestive problems, reduce inflammation, and even help alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia. Centaury is often prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
